sql_array: CREATE TABLE ngram_test (id UInt32, input_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT ngramMinHashArgCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) AS hashes FROM ngram_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE ngram_test SET input_string = 'CLICKHOUSE DB' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ngramMinHashArgCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string, 5, 10) AS hashes FROM ngram_test WHERE id = 1;
